name: @bradford-tech/expo-carplay
description: A React Native Expo module for integrating Apple CarPlay navigation templates
author: sbs44 <83440025+sbs44@users.noreply.github.com> (https://github.com/sbs44)

scripts.dev: cd example && npm run prebuild && npm run ios
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.format: prettier --write --cache --log-level warn "**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json}" && npm run --prefix example format && swiftformat ios/ --swift-version 6
scripts.lint: expo-module lint src/ --fix && swiftlint --fix --quiet && npm run --prefix example lint
scripts.prepare: patch-package && rm -f node_modules/.bin/prettier && ln -s ../prettier/bin/prettier.cjs node_modules/.bin/prettier && chmod +x node_modules/.bin/prettier && expo-module prepare && expo-module build plugin
